sections.paragraph:
Original: נקּד

Transliteration: niqqûd

Phonetic: nik-kood'

BDB Definition:

  1. crumbled thing, thing easily crumbled, crumbs
    1. crumbs
    2. apparently a kind of hard biscuit or cake

Origin: from the same as H5348

TWOT entry: 1410b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
